channel.title: Golang on History
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on History

item.title: Go.02 Predeclared Types and Declarations
item.description: Go’s predeclared types explained — literals, zero values, booleans, and why Go has 12 different numeric types.

item.title: Go.01 Setting Up Your Go Development Environment
item.description: How to install Go, configure VS Code, and build your first Hello World program with essential tooling.
